diagrams.title: Shallow vs Deep Copy Memory Diagram
diagrams.description: Visual comparison of memory layout for shallow and deep copy operations
elements: Shallow copy: two pointers to same memory
Deep copy: two pointers to separate memory blocks
diagrams.purpose: Understanding memory management in copy constructors
